reports.title: tinyhumansai/openhuman
reports.summary: 私有、简洁、强大的个人 AI 超级智能项目，主打本地化与个人助手能力。
reports.content: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful. Rust-based project focused on personal AI super intelligence, privacy, and a simple but powerful experience.

reports.title: HKUDS/CLI-Anything
reports.summary: 把几乎所有软件都做成 Agent 原生体验的 CLI 方案，强调命令行里的智能工作流。
reports.content: "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native". A Python-based CLI project that promotes agent-native workflows across software, with CLI-Hub integration and an agent-first approach.

reports.title: calcom/cal.diy
reports.summary: 面向所有人的日程安排基础设施，目标是让预约与排期更开放、可定制。
reports.content: Scheduling infrastructure for absolutely everyone. TypeScript project that rethinks scheduling as open infrastructure, likely extending Cal.com style booking and scheduling capabilities.

reports.title: oven-sh/bun
reports.summary: 集运行时、打包器、测试器和包管理器于一体的超快 JavaScript 工具链。
reports.content: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one. Bun is a high-performance JS runtime designed to replace multiple tooling layers.

reports.title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
reports.summary: 开源的 AI 图像与视频生成工作台，集成大量模型并支持自托管。
reports.content: Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models, self-hosted, MIT licensed, and built to replace proprietary creation workflows.

reports.title: GenCAD
reports.summary: 生成式 CAD 工具，面向工程设计与几何建模。

reports.title: Prolog Coding Horror
reports.summary: 一篇关于 Prolog 编程实践与踩坑经历的文章。

reports.title_zh: ThinkPad：从 IBM 便当盒到联想 AI 工作站
reports.summary: 回顾 ThinkPad 的演进，以及它如何走向 AI 工作站时代。

reports.title: Fabricked: Misconfiguring Infinity Fabric to Break AMD SEV-SNP
reports.title_zh: Fabricked：错误配置 Infinity Fabric 以击穿 AMD SEV-SNP
reports.summary: 研究如何通过错误配置内存互连来破坏 AMD SEV-SNP 的安全边界。
